collisionMode: recursive second-plus-supported-third-order D3Q19 Hermite reconstruction with a convex equilibrium-to-post-collision positivity scale
scientificVerdict: The D=8 RR3 stationary-sphere case completed 30 convective times with native drag and both transverse-force coefficients archived under every unchanged numerical gate. The vector history may enter only the separately preregistered multimode analysis.
